name: CAPILLARY TELANGIECTASIA
definition: CAPILLARY ANGIOMA nest of dilated capillaries separated by normal neural tissue; commonly "cryptic"
dominant_finding: poorly defined area of dilated vessels (resembling petechiae)
discriminating_features: poorly defined area of dilated vessels (resembling petechiae)
best delineated with MR (due to hemorrhage) with focus of increased signal intensity on

general: poorly defined area of dilated vessels (resembling petechiae)
best delineated with MR (due to hemorrhage) with focus of increased signal intensity on
